_comment: Hardware profile to model mapping. When better models come out, update this file. No code changes needed.
_modularity: Every model entry is swappable. Ollama and LM Studio are interchangeable runtimes. If a new runtime appears (vLLM, llama.cpp server, etc.), add it as a runtime option.
_qmd_note: Fields marked 'indexed_by: qmd' indicate models QMD uses internally for its 3-layer search pipeline (BM25 + vector + LLM rerank). QMD manages these internally — they are NOT separately addressable API endpoints. Run 'qmd index <dir>' to build the search index; QMD pulls these models automatically via Ollama.
_litellm_note: API routing for all cloud models goes through LiteLLM (port 4000). See config/litellm.yaml for the full routing table.

mac-apple-silicon-24gb.description: Apple Silicon Mac with 24GB+ unified memory. MLX optimized.
mac-apple-silicon-24gb._runtime_note: Ollama v0.18.2+ auto-detects Metal. LM Studio 0.4.6 has continuous batching for higher throughput. Either works.
mac-apple-silicon-24gb._memory_note: Only one large model loads at a time. Ollama hot-swaps automatically. Total budget: 24GB.

router.name: phi4-mini
router.use_for: Fast triage/routing — stays loaded, ~15-30 tok/s, leaves RAM for larger models

synthesis.name: gemma3:27b
synthesis.use_for: Long-context research synthesis (128K context), deep analysis. LMSys Elo 1339, top 10 globally.

code.name: qwen2.5-coder:14b
code.use_for: Code generation, #1 ranked local coding model 2026, 80+ languages

embedding.name: nomic-embed-text:v2
embedding.use_for: Vector embeddings. 1.6B contrastive pairs, 100 languages, Matryoshka dims 768→256.

query_expansion.note: QMD handles query expansion internally — no separate model required.

nvidia-8gb-32gb-ram.description: NVIDIA GPU 8GB VRAM + 32GB system RAM. CUDA optimized.
nvidia-8gb-32gb-ram._vram_ceiling: 8GB VRAM hard cap. All models must fit at Q4_K_M. 7B models use 4.5-5.5GB, leaving 2.5-3.5GB for context. DO NOT load 14B+ models — they will OOM crash.

general.name: phi4-mini
general.use_for: Ops, structured output, triage. Best reasoning-per-parameter in sub-5B class. Safe 4.5GB headroom for context.

code.name: qwen2.5-coder:7b
code.use_for: Code generation on worker node. Codestral Q4_K_M also viable.

models._reasoning_note: 14B+ models EXCEED 8GB VRAM. Route reasoning tasks to mac-apple-silicon-24gb node or cloud-overflow profile. Queen capability lookup handles this automatically.

mac-apple-silicon-16gb.description: Apple Silicon Mac with 16GB unified memory. MLX but tighter budget.

models._note: No 14B reasoning model — not enough RAM with other services running.

mac-apple-silicon-8gb.description: Apple Silicon Mac with 8GB unified memory. Tight. Satellite recommended.

models._note: 8GB M1 MacBook Air. Can search and run tiny models. Not a power node.

mac-intel.description: Intel Mac (no Apple Silicon). CPU-only. LM Studio NOT available.
mac-intel.runtime_note: LM Studio requires Apple Silicon. This node uses Ollama CPU-only.

models._note: CPU inference only. 3-6 tokens/sec. Fine for batch jobs, painful for interactive. Consider Satellite role.

nvidia-4gb-legacy.description: Older NVIDIA GPU with 4-6GB VRAM (GTX 960, 1060, 1650, etc.).

models._note: Limited VRAM. 4B model fits. 7B+ will spill to RAM and slow down badly.

cpu-only-16gb.description: No GPU (or unsupported GPU). 16GB RAM minimum.

cpu-only-8gb.description: No GPU. 8GB RAM. Minimum viable. Satellite role strongly recommended.

models._note: Barely functional for inference. Better as search-only Satellite (QMD only, no LLM).

satellite-search-only.description: No LLM inference. QMD search node only. For very low-spec machines.

models._note: This node only runs QMD for local search. All LLM requests route to other nodes or cloud.

cloud-overflow.description: When local capacity is exhausted or task needs frontier reasoning.

routing_rules._comment: NadirClaw uses these in Phase 2. Jarvis routes manually in Phase 1.
